acquisition method: The Q Exactive Plus mass spectrometer was operated in the data dependent mode
alkylation reagent: alkylated with 50 μl of 55 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 50 μl of 55 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: Samples were digested by adding 1 μg of trypsin
collision energy: fragmented by higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) with normalised collision energy of 28
instrument: coupled to a Q Exactive Plus mass spectrometer
ionization type: equipped with a Nanospray Flex ionisation source
labeling: Samples were analysed using an UltiMate 3000 nano-HPLC system coupled to a Q Exactive Plus mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: reduced with 50 μl of 10 mM dithiothreitol
reduction concentration: reduced with 50 μl of 10 mM dithiothreitol
